modules.name: Core
modules.description: Authentication, roles, UI shell, and module loader. Required for all instances.

modules.name: Time Clock
modules.description: Clock in/out, timecard history, overtime tracking, and pay period summaries.

modules.name: Pipe Calculator
modules.description: Offsets, rolling offsets, travel, fitting allowances, and pipe math tools.

modules.name: MRO
modules.description: Material requisition and ordering. Track materials, generate orders, manage vendors.

modules.name: Task List
modules.description: Job task management with assignments, priorities, statuses, and due dates.

modules.name: Messaging
modules.description: Real-time crew messaging, announcements, and notification system.

modules.name: Documents
modules.description: Document storage, sharing, and version tracking. Drawings, specs, submittals.

modules.name: Reports
modules.description: Manpower reports, productivity tracking, cost analysis, and export tools.

modules.name: Daily Log
modules.description: Foreman daily logs with weather, manpower, equipment, work performed, and notes.

modules.name: Safety
modules.description: Safety toolbox talks, incident reports, JSA/JHA forms, and compliance tracking.

modules.name: Inventory
modules.description: Material and tool inventory tracking, bin locations, counts, and reorder alerts.
